hero.slide_money_support: Less improvisation. More criteria. More control over what you spend.
hero.slide_time_support: Less back and forth. Less friction. Decide faster what to cook today.
hero.slide_health_support: Better nutrition, without breaking your culture or your real life.
hero.slide_control_support_prefix: Tell me what you have and
hero.slide_control_support_suffix: helps you solve it with clarity.

pillars.section_support_suffix: is here to help you win something real every week.
pillars.pillar_1_body: Cooking smarter is also a financial decision. CookPilot helps you resolve meals with more criteria, less waste, and better cost visibility.
pillars.pillar_2_body: Less time wondering what to cook. Less back and forth. Less last-minute improvisation. More clarity from the very first step.
pillars.pillar_3_title: Eat better without breaking your reality
pillars.pillar_3_body: Better nutrition shouldn't mean giving up your culture or living in guilt. CookPilot starts from real food, real context, and a real kitchen.

how_it_works.section_support: Tell it your context. CookPilot does the magic. You cook with clarity.
how_it_works.step_1_support: Start from your real kitchen, not an ideal recipe book.
how_it_works.step_2_support: Not a random recipe. A decision with criteria.
how_it_works.step_3_support: Less doubt. More control. Better execution.

demo.section_microcopy: 1 minute. Money, time, and health, grounded in a real product.
demo.summary_body: CookPilot shows how a simple conversation can help you save money, save time, and eat better, solving what to cook with more clarity from your real context.

brand.section_title_main: CookPilot exists to give you back
brand.section_body: Save money. Save time. Eat better. Less errors, less friction, and more clarity around something as basic as feeding yourself well.
